steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
Sentence 1: B. pumilio's reference is a holotype — the original specimen.
Sentence 2: G. inflata's reference is a neotype — not the original specimen.

The two specimens differ in kind: original vs. not original.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
By contrast highlights the difference between the two cases — exactly what's needed.

Moreover (addition), admittedly (concession), and for instance (example) don't capture the contrast.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
